headline: Tired of AI and Oil? Buy the Robot.
summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) is currently hovering around the $450 mark, a level that has historically acted as a psychological and technical floor. For an investor, the question isn't just "is it cheap?" (it almost never is), but "is the premium still justified?”.

headline: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Abbott (ABT): Should You Buy?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Abbott (ABT) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: Assessing Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Abbott Laboratories stock snapshot Abbott Laboratories (ABT) has drawn investor attention after a weak share price patch, with the stock down about 7% over the past month and 20% over the past 3 months. At a last close of US$101.83 and a market value near US$178.2b, Abbott sits on annual revenue of about US$44.3b and net income of roughly US$6.5b across its diversified healthcare segments.
